overview.system_goal: Simulate Xiaohongshu-style multi-channel information diffusion: users receive content via algorithm feeds, social follow graph, search, and @/comment/reply notifications; LLM agents decide short-form comments under memory/activity/freshness gates.
overview.environment_description: Shared content_pool of notes with nested comments; mention_pool queues notifications per user; time advances in scheduled day slices with current_notes windows.
overview.workflow_structure: Each step: EnvAgent StartEvent → UserAgent (exposure + self-memory) + Algorithm (sync notes) → on-demand recommendation/search → comment & mention side-effects → step advance.

design_concepts.interaction_patterns: Pull-based algorithm recommendations (GetAlgorithmRecomendationEvent), probabilistic social follow feed, mention delivery via mention_pool, optional search continuation, keep-following re-exposure.
design_concepts.communication_protocols: Comments and mention_pool updates use AddCommentEvent / MentionPoolUpdateEvent RPC to SimEnv (async, not in workflow graph). RecommendationSpreadingEvent / MentionSpreadingEvent mark handler completion.
design_concepts.decision_mechanisms: UserAgentGates: memory similarity, freshness, activity level, interaction threshold sampling; LLM JSON decisions for comment/reply/@/search/keep-following.
design_concepts.execution_flow: StartEvent → get_exposure_stream ∥ generate_memory_from_own_notes; StartEvent → Algorithm.update_current_notes; exposure → {AlgorithmRecommendationEvent|SocialRecommendationEvent|KeepFollowingEvent|SearchResultEvent} → receive_recommendation; exposure → MentionEvent → handle_mention

details.agent_behaviors: UserAgent scans follow feed since last_login_timestamp, requests algorithm types from params_rednote_qwen25_14B.json, processes mention_pool with attention_budget cap, and runs receive_recommendation / handle_mention with chunked LLM calls. Algorithm agents run hot/random/interest recommenders and relevant search.
details.decision_algorithms: Hot: popularity + 7d comment distribution; Random: MAU-weighted sampling; Interest: embedding similarity + candidate_note_ids_by_user; Search: embedding relevance to query.
details.specific_constraints: current_notes = notes with time < min(current_timestamp + timestamp_duration, simulation_cap); comments in prompts truncated to top sub_comment_count; simulation capped by max_span_days and max_step from params.
details.process_sequence: 1) Load content_pool & profiles; 2) For each step broadcast StartEvent; 3) User exposure + memory; 4) Algorithm/on-demand feeds; 5) LLM comment decisions → content_pool & mention_pool; 6) Mention handling; 7) Advance timestamp, rebuild current_notes, save channel snapshots & metrics.

agent_types.UserAgent: Xiaohongshu user with profile (nickname, interest_tags, activity_level, follow_ids/fan_ids), memory, recommended_note_ids_by_channel, mentioned_note_ids_by_channel, keep_following_note_ids.
agent_types.Algorithm: Platform recommender/search agents: recomment_agent_0001 (random), recomment_agent_0002 (hot), recomment_agent_0003 (interest), search_agent_0001 (relevant search).

metrics.name: Diffusion Generation Over Time
metrics.description: Total comment count in content_pool per monitor tick; line chart over simulation steps.

metrics.name: Diffusion Volume Real Time
metrics.description: By comment timestamp (real time): cumulative comment count line + per-bin histogram; x-axis is UTC wall time, not simulation step.
metrics.calculation_logic: Collect comment timestamps via time_to_ms; adaptive histogram; raw_data._viz_kind comment_realtime.

metrics.name: Diffusion Top-Level vs Reply Over Time
metrics.description: Per tick: count top-level comments (empty parent_comment_id) vs replies.
metrics.calculation_logic: Two scalars per tick for dual subplot export.

metrics.name: User Diffusion Count Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of total comments per user (k=0,1,2,…); denominator = registered_user_agent_ids or pool authors∪commenters.
metrics.calculation_logic: Histogram of per-user comment totals; raw_data._viz_kind user_comment_count_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Note Diffusion Count Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of comment counts under each note; denominator = all notes in content_pool.
metrics.calculation_logic: Histogram of per-note comment counts; raw_data._viz_kind note_comment_count_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Posting User Diffusion Behavior
metrics.description: Per tick: for each note author, count own-note top-level, own-note replies, and comments on others' notes; exports CSV + JSONL snapshots.
metrics.calculation_logic: Returns {users: [...]} table; monitor writes CSV and posting_user_diffusion_behavior/snapshots.jsonl.

metrics.name: Text Similarity
metrics.description: Mean cosine similarity between generated comment embeddings and corresponding note embeddings (BGE via embedding_client).
metrics.calculation_logic: Embed each generated comment text; compare to precomputed note embedding from reference_embedding_path; return mean cosine or None if unavailable.

metrics.name: Text Diversity
metrics.description: Lexical/semantic diversity of generated comments: TTR, Distinct-2/3, 1-Self-BLEU, Div_sem (pairwise BGE distance). Embeds every comment; raw_data includes _comment_embeddings and content_pool_with_embeddings.
metrics.calculation_logic: Pool all comment texts (strip @); compute diversity metrics; embed via embedding_client; raw_data._viz_kind comment_diversity.

metrics.name: Text Max Reference Similarity
metrics.description: Reference-driven max cosine: each reference comment vs all simulated comments under the same note_id, then mean over matched references (see evaluate_max_reference_cosine_batch.py).
metrics.calculation_logic: Load reference CSV by note_id; embed reference & generated comments; mean of max cosine per reference row.
